//: Pin the editor's TypeScript to the workspace version (5.8.3) so editor diagnostics match what the build / tsc / tests use. VS Code's newer bundled TypeScript flags options on its TS 6/7 deprecation track (moduleResolution=node, baseUrl, ...) that the project's 5.8.3 does not. After opening the workspace, confirm via: Ctrl+Shift+P -> 'TypeScript: Select TypeScript Version' -> 'Use Workspace Version'.
